---
title: "Stepwise EFA Ch4"
author: "Colin Madland"
date: "2026-03-16"
categories: [EFA, exploratory factor analysis, R]
image: "owl.jpg"
execute:
    freeze: true
bibliography: ../../../references.bib
csl: ../../../apa.csl
---

::: {.callout}
This tutorial follows the steps in @watkinsStepbyStepGuideExploratory2020. 
The first three chapters are introductory and I won't cover them here. Also, the text is specific to Rstudio and I'm using Positron, so I'll translate the code appropriately.
:::

# Importing and Saving Data and Results

```{r}
#| label: libraries
#load required libraries
library(psych)
```


```{r}
#| label: read-data
# Read  data files into R. Files were downloaded from the resources site (CH.2) as .xls and I have converted them to .csv using the 'Save-As' command in MS Excel.
# Create a dataframe called `df_iq`

df_iq <- read.csv(file = "stepwise-efa-data/iq.csv")

# Display the first 6 rows of `df_iq`
head(df_iq)
```

...continuing...
